query:
INSERT INTO products (establishmentId, categoryId, name, description, price, status, hasStock, sortOrder) 
SELECT 2, c.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, 'active', true, p.sortOrder
FROM categories c
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT 'Brownie com Sorvete' as name, 'Brownie de chocolate quente com sorvete de creme e calda de chocolate' as description, 19.90 as price, 1 as sortOrder
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Petit Gateau', 'Bolinho de chocolate com recheio cremoso, sorvete de creme e frutas vermelhas', 24.90, 2
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Cheesecake', 'Fatia de cheesecake com calda de frutas vermelhas', 18.90, 3
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Sorvete Artesanal', '2 bolas de sorvete artesanal (chocolate, creme, morango ou flocos)', 14.90, 4
) p
WHERE c.name = 'Sobremesas' AND c.establishmentId = 2;
